action: Implement the first upstream evaluator required by R-030: a version-pinned, fail-closed Identifier_Status parser and profile evaluator.
verification: Six deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime.
handoff: Implement the independently version-pinned confusable-skeleton registry, then connect both upstream results to decideIdentifierAdmission. Before production use, authenticate and digest the exact Unicode data files and add XID and joining-control policy layers.
